name: WEB-PPT
intent: WEB-PPT enables teams to co-create, generate, and export presentation decks through a unified workspace combining canvas editing, markdown import, AI-assisted authoring, and real-time collaboration. Success is measured by reliable end-to-end deck production from idea to multi-format export with consistent slide quality and low manual rework.
constraints: Support both manual authoring and AI-assisted generation in the same deck lifecycle.
AI generation must tolerate provider outages or missing credentials via deterministic fallback behavior.
Collaborative editing must preserve consistency under concurrent operations.
Generated slide outputs must remain renderable for HTML, PDF, PNG, and PPTX export paths.
Agent-team orchestration must enforce stage validation and return actionable diagnostics on partial failures.
Local development should run with Node.js and workspace scripts without mandatory external infrastructure.

domains.name: deck-authoring
domains.description: Core deck, slide, and element authoring lifecycle for canvas-based editing.

domains.name: markdown-ingestion
domains.description: Transforms markdown and rich directives into structured slide content and visual metadata.

domains.name: ai-content-generation
domains.description: Produces outlines, page copy, and orchestrated agent-team artifacts for slide creation.

domains.name: collaboration-sync
domains.description: Maintains real-time shared state and conflict-safe synchronization across collaborators.

domains.name: export-pipeline
domains.description: Builds final deliverables from deck state across web and document export formats.

integrations.name: OpenAI API
integrations.description: Primary external LLM provider for draft, outline, and rewrite generation.

integrations.name: Anthropic API
integrations.description: Alternative LLM provider for structured and narrative generation tasks.

integrations.name: WebSocket Transport
integrations.description: Bi-directional channel for collaboration presence and sync messaging.

integrations.name: Puppeteer Runtime
integrations.description: Headless browser runtime used for HTML-to-PDF/PNG export rendering.

integrations.name: Filesystem Export Storage
integrations.description: Local file output target for generated export artifacts.
